# Character AI: Chat, Talk, Text · AI Chat

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 9:54 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Ads pressure](#theme-ads)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 15, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Christina_, Jul 15, 2026, 3/5: "Look, I understand that if, for example is a character named Mason, you text with this bot and decide to move with the story, you introduce one or more characters, like if I introduce 'Kelly', the bot plays both Mason and Kelly, or just Kelly and later switches to Mason again. The problem is, when I try that now, it doesn't work anymore. Did that come with a update? Or is it a bug? I tried to see if it was just one bot, but it happened with every bot. Can you fix it please? I love the app tho"

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      5 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Hacker FG_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "What used to be the greatest is now the worst way too many ads and wants to steal photos of your face "for verification" do not use this app.There's plenty of better ones"
            2. _Pastel_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "The updates just gets worse, too many ads and the memories of each character is bad"
            3. _GothFox “Shadow”_, Jul 19, 2026, 3/5: "Too many ads (both app and site, I tend to use only the site) as they seem to pop up every thirty to forty-five seconds or so, even with an ad blocker, but at least easy to use and navigate. Also, please bring back the older chat styles (Dynamic, Roar, Goro, Nyan, etc.), fix bot instabilities, and please get rid of all those annoying ads as well as swipe limit + every other issue with both the app and the site. I won't be asking again. Plus, some of us prefer our privacy and miss the old c.ai."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      2 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Itz_Alex_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "Love the responses to any criticism of "It's expensive to run", yeah of course it is. But you can handle it better than making the expirience worse and worse for people that can't afford to pay. Janitor is free, and outside of their constant changes to the UI, they don't ruin their own app for moneys sake. They have a monthly subscriptions for those who can afford to support them, but they don't remove the most basic of features to make you buy it. This app is now a cash grab to be functional."
